name: Dragon Apple
description: A crisp apple infused with draconic energy. Dragons love these.

name: Ember Grapes
description: Small, glowing grapes that taste like summer heat.

name: Sky Berry
description: Berries that grow only on high peaks. Very nutritious for dragons.

name: Void Cherry
description: A dark, mysterious cherry that pulses with energy.

name: Golden Peach
description: A legendary fruit said to grant great power to mythical beasts.

name: Plasma Lemon
description: Sour enough to jumpstart a dragon's metabolism.

name: Neon Orange
description: Glowing citrus that enhances a dragon's natural abilities.

name: Crystle Pear
description: The ultimate fruit found only in the deepest parts of the Dragon Ground.
